markets.question: Spread: CA Paranaense (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for March 18 at 6:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CA Paranaense" if CA Paranaense win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Cruzeiro EC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game between Llaneros FC and Cúcuta Deportivo FC, scheduled for March 17 at 5:10 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Llaneros FC and Cúcuta Deportivo FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

markets.question: CA Paranaense vs. Cruzeiro EC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between CA Paranaense and Cruzeiro EC, scheduled for March 18 at 6:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CA Paranaense and Cruzeiro EC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
